Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim &Amp; Compromise Of Pending Action (Person With A Disability)
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Text Ruling

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-02-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action
Off Calendar Oct-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Compromise of a Disputed Claim. Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok and S. Vantree, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Spence J. Pahlke, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Linda Guerrero and Jesse Guerrero present in court.
Witness: Tanis Kelly, Settlement planner appearing for Plaintiffs.
Plaintiffs sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $4,650,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $752,401.54 payable to Law Firm of Walkup, Melodia, Kelly & Schoenberger
Medical Reimbursement and Expenses: $115,544.13
Costs: $0
The net balance of $3,782,054.33 will be distributed as follows:
$2,387,819 deposited into an annuity.
$1,394,235.33 deposited in a special needs trust to be established through the Probate Dept.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Disputed Claim and Order to Deposit Money into annuity and special needs trust.

Status Hearing Scheduled on (90 days from today) at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into annuity and special needs trust.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing on Jan. 5, 2016.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT STUART LINNE's Motion To Change Venue is Denied. Defendant has not met it's burden. Plaintiff has shown that Dignity's place of business is in San Francisco.
